checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

findings: Cloudflare detected (passive — no active challenge)
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~820 URLs

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 736 divs with only 22 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 101/163 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 0/4 inputs have names, 1/2 have types
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Heading hierarchy has 1 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)
2 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 72/74 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: Non-existent path returned 200 instead of 404
Soft 404 detected — returns 200 for missing pages
No rate limit headers found
Proper 405 with Allow header: GET, HEAD

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~562,065 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 0% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 22 — moderately nested
Reading this page costs $0.70–$8.43 per load ($3.51–$42.15 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
All 31 images have alt attributes (14 descriptive, 17 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
Found 2 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
3 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
57 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 226ms
Moderate payload: 326KB
No redirects — direct access
Lean resources: 0 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: br
